query:
SELECT
                    file.file_name,
                    file.category,
                    file.env,
                    file.destination,
                    blob.content
                FROM artifact_files file
                JOIN blob_storage blob ON file.file_content = blob.id
                WHERE file.artifact_staging_id = $1
                  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR file.category = $2)
                ORDER BY file.category, file.file_name
